  1. uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context.AbstractContextNode

Packages that use AbstractContextNode
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
Provides components and hierarchical models for the ASI Context Explorer.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources
Provides UI components for managing and interacting with multimodal resources.

  • Uses of AbstractContextNode in uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context

    Subclasses of AbstractContextNode in uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ContextManagerNode
    The root node of the context tree, representing the ContextManager.
    class 
    ContextProviderNode
    A context tree node representing a ContextProvider.
    class 
    HistoryNode
    A context tree node representing the conversation history.
    class 
    MessageNode
    A context tree node representing a single message in the conversation.
    class 
    PartNode
    A context tree node representing a single part of a message.
    class 
    ToolkitNode
    A context tree node representing an AbstractToolkit.
    class 
    ToolManagerNode
    A specialized context tree node representing the ToolManager.
    class 
    ToolNode
    A context tree node representing an AbstractTool.
    class 
    ToolsNode
    A context tree node that acts as a container for all tools within a toolkit.
